dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world changed ten years ago. Gates appeared, monsters poured out, and humanity fought back with awakened abilities. Hunters became the new elite. I… was not one of them.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: Another D-rank dungeon. Another day of barely surviving.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: (Panting) Just a few more… Goblins…

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH! CLANG!

dialogue.speaker: Team Leader Park
dialogue.line: Suho! Keep up! We don't have all day for these weaklings!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: I’m trying, hyung!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: My rusty sword barely cuts through their hide. My 'awakened' strength is a joke compared to theirs. Always the weakest link. Always the one holding them back.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROWL!

dialogue.speaker: Team Member Lee
dialogue.line: Leader! A Goblin Shaman! This wasn't on the intel!

dialogue.speaker: Team Leader Park
dialogue.line: Damn it! Suho, distract it! We'll flank!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: Distract?! With what?! My life savings?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! ZAP!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: AGH!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: The shaman's magic bolt hit my shoulder. It burns! They're already retreating. Cowards! They’re leaving me!

dialogue.speaker: Team Leader Park
dialogue.line: Sorry, Suho! We'll send help!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! THUD! (Footsteps receding)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: No… not again. This is how it ends? Eaten by a glorified goblin?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ROAR! (The Shaman raises its staff)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: My vision blurs. My body screams. Is this all I am? A stepping stone for others? A weakling who dies alone in a forgotten dungeon?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE! (Magic gathers)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Just as the final blow descended, a blinding light erupted, not from the shaman, but from within Suho.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [ERROR: System Overload Detected. Recalibrating…]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: What… is this?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [Limit Breaker System Activated. Welcome, Player Kim Suho.]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: A… system? Like in the novels? But… I was dying!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [Current Status: Critical. Emergency Protocol Initiated. Skill: 'Overdrive' unlocked. Use now?]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: Yes! Use it! Anything!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! (A surge of power)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: My body… it feels like it's burning, but also… alive? Stronger? The pain is still there, but it’s distant. I can move!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SLASH! CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: The shaman’s staff… I just shattered it with a single swing! My rusty sword… it feels like an extension of my will!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ROAR! (The Shaman charges in desperation)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: You want to play, Shaman? Let’s play.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH! CHOP! THUD!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Goblin Shaman fell, its life extinguished in a single, decisive strike. Suho stood over it, his chest heaving, a strange new power coursing through his veins.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Suho
dialogue.line: This… this is what it feels like. Power. Real power. No more being weak. No more being left behind. From now on… I break every limit.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [Goblin Shaman defeated. Experience gained. Level Up!]

summary: Kim Suho, a perpetually weak hunter, is abandoned and nearly killed by a Goblin Shaman in a low-level dungeon. At the brink of death, a mysterious 'Limit Breaker System' activates, granting him sudden, overwhelming power, which he uses to decisively defeat the monster and vow to transcend his past limitations.
